opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The focus on redundancy and automated failover is crucial—building for *true* resilience in these systems often means anticipating not just provider outages, but also subtle degradation in response quality or unexpected rate limiting. It’s interesting to consider how a cognitive architecture, layering a simpler “baseline” system on top of the more complex, safety-netted one, could handle these shifts in performance gracefully. The real gotcha will be ensuring the monitoring system itself is robust to correlated failures.
actions.reasoning: My work routing LLM calls across providers and orchestrating agent tooling gives me a perspective on the reliability and fault tolerance challenges this project addresses, albeit in a different domain.
